report.summary: Audited new compare/exchange and crypto-card pages for UX issues, created 5 missing OG images (SVG+PNG), added metadata layouts for 5 client-component pages, and fixed breadcrumb navigation bug.

sections.title: UX Improvements
items: Identified compare/exchanges pages (bybit-vs-binance, gate-io-vs-kucoin) missing metadata and OG images due to 'use client' directive — fixed via layout.tsx wrappers
Identified crypto-cards calculator pages (cashback, card-comparison, rewards) missing OG metadata — added openGraph and twitter card metadata to existing layout files
Fixed cashback-calculator breadcrumb using href='#' for current page — removed href so it renders as plain text per UX best practices
Verified badges, courses, and whale-watch pages have correct OG metadata and image references
Confirmed ReviewPage component (used by 20+ crypto-card review pages) has proper structured data and layout patterns

sections.title: Visuals Created
items: OG image: bybit-vs-binance (1200x630) — VS comparison layout with exchange stats
OG image: gate-io-vs-kucoin (1200x630) — VS comparison layout for altcoin exchanges
OG image: cashback-calculator (1200x630) — bar chart visualization with card rewards
OG image: card-comparison-tool (1200x630) — grid of card mini-cards with cashback rates
OG image: rewards-calculator (1200x630) — estimated annual rewards display

sections.title: Code Changes
items: Created layout.tsx with full Metadata export for compare/exchanges/bybit-vs-binance
Created layout.tsx with full Metadata export for compare/exchanges/gate-io-vs-kucoin
Updated layout.tsx for crypto-cards/calculators/cashback-calculator with OG + Twitter metadata
Updated layout.tsx for crypto-cards/calculators/card-comparison-tool with OG + Twitter metadata
Updated layout.tsx for crypto-cards/calculators/rewards-calculator with OG + Twitter metadata
